title: Crypto VC Haun Ventures raises $1 billion for funds investing in blockchain and AI
snippet: Last year, Haun Ventures was reportedly seeking to raise $1 billion to launch two new crypto-focused funds.

title: DTC to begin tokenized asset rollout in July ahead of full launch as it gets feedback from BlackRock, Circle and others

title: Bullish to acquire Equiniti in $4.2 billion deal combining transfer agent and tokenization stack
snippet: Bullish agreed to acquire Equiniti in a $4.2 billion deal combining its tokenization stack with the global transfer agent’s infrastructure.

title: Latest FINRA okay means Securitize becomes tokenized securities one stop shop
snippet: FINRA has granted the tokenization firm Securitize approval to custody tokenized securities as part of its regular broker dealer authorization. title: FalconX and Sygnum partner to launch tokenized credit offering for institutional clients
snippet: FalconX’s facility extends credit through a special-purpose vehicle, backed by overcollateralized loans and monitored in real time.

snippet: Anchorage Digital is exploring a stablecoin issuance model designed to offer institutional stablecoin issuers better liquidity, capital efficiency and security.
